title: praravinia multinervia
intro: Praravinia multinervia, also known as the 'prickly bush', is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are effective in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Praravinia multinervia is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
